title: Dias Museum celebrates 37 years
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS -   The Bartolomeu Dias...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -   The Bartolomeu Dias Museum hosted its annual celebration in honour of the museum's official opening 37 years ago, on Friday 6 January.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Bartolomeu Dias Museum hosted its annual celebration in honour of the museum's official opening 37 years ago, on Friday 6 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The museum was officially opened in Mossel Bay on 3 February 1989."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay's mayor, Dirk Kotzé, as well as representatives of the Western Cape Department of Cultural Affairs and Sport, the Transnet National Port of Authority (TNPA) and the Consulate General of Portugal joined in the festivities.","html":"Mossel Bay's mayor, Dirk Kotzé, as well as representatives of the Western Cape Department of Cultural Affairs and Sport, the Transnet National Port of Authority (TNPA) and the Consulate General of Portugal joined in the festivities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Learners of Global Academy of Education and Kids Kingdom, as well artists of the Heritage Theatre in Mossel Bay, showcased their many talents through lively musical performances, creating an energetic atmosphere.","html":"Learners of Global Academy of Education and Kids Kingdom, as well artists of the Heritage Theatre in Mossel Bay, showcased their many talents through lively musical performances, creating an energetic atmosphere."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Performers of the Heritage Theatre in Mossel Bay delivering music and dance at the Bartholomeu Dias Museum. Photo: Tersia Marais","html":"Performers of the Heritage Theatre in Mossel Bay delivering music and dance at the Bartholomeu Dias Museum. Photo: Tersia Marais"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"At the end of the celebrations, cake and refreshments were enjoyed by guests who also took the opportunity to explore the museum."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Watch a video below of the musical performances. Video: Tersia Marais","html":"Watch a video below of the musical performances. Video: Tersia Marais"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
